title: [codereview-pass3] coap_dtn.c: no S&F retrieval path; missing GET handler and retrieve_for callback for pending messages per LCI spec 17.5.8
description: Edge cases: Integration incomplete without retrieval. No CoAP GET on /deaddrop or /confessions to trigger lichen_dtn_retrieve_for with callback that sends stored payloads. No periodic expiry timer. Buffer may fill without S&F delivery. Matches the original issue title. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-qk8y
close_reason: Added S&F retrieval path with GET /deaddrop and /confessions triggering lichen_dtn_retrieve_for callback + periodic expiry timer using proper time; fixed all edge cases; explored zephyr/rust/coap/schc/rpl; init deps followed AGENTS.md graph; clean no TODOs; lint/tests passed with verification
